query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.cpf, p.id as pdi_id, c.nome as ciclo FROM users u LEFT JOIN pdis p ON p.colaboradorId = u.id LEFT JOIN ciclos c ON p.cicloId = c.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%LEONARDO%' OR u.cpf = '88020673253';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.cpf, p.id as pdi_id, c.nome as ciclo FROM users u LEFT JOIN pdis p ON p.colaboradorId = u.id LEFT JOIN ciclos c ON p.cicloId = c.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%LEONARDO%' OR u.cpf = '88020673253';
